title: Upgraded Food
description: a minecraft mod that lets you upgrade food to give you special effects and more nutrition/saturation when you eat them!
body:
![title text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c008d3f4d005c46c90a30f61a513fa79a0fe4b9d.png)

Upgraded food is a mod that lets you craft a mid-game block, the Food Upgrader. 

When regular **cooked** food items (and a few others) are **dropped on top** of the Food Upgrader,they transform into upgraded versions of themselves, giving the player unique effects for each item plus more hunger and saturation regained!! 

e.g; **Beetroot Soup** --> **Upgraded Beetroot Soup**, which gives you **8 extra hearts** (almost an entire second health bar!) and way more hunger and saturation when consumed!!

the aim of the mod is to encourage players to grow and farm a bunch of different foods without punishing the player (like that "nutritional balance" mod that some modpacks have, which sucks), instead granting useful special effects, i also wanted to make the gameplay loop of minecraft a little more fun and less monotonous by letting you play differently in the mid/end game with food! :3 I really hope this makes the game more fun for you!!

![FOODS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da1add8530be5b909c875f2a1467f39988a723a1.png)

a full list of each conversion and its added effects are (all of these refill more hunger than their vanilla counterparts):

**Upgraded Steak**: Regeneration, Resistance

**Upgraded Cooked Porkchop**: Regeneration, Resistance

**Upgraded Cooked Chicken**: Strength, Instant Health, Resistance

**Upgraded Dried Kelp**: Conduit Power, Water Breathing, Dolphins Grace

**Upgraded Beetroot Soup**: Absorption IV (8 hearts!)

**Upgraded Baked Potato**: Haste (25 seconds)

**Upgraded Bread**: Strength

**Upgraded Melon Slice**: Speed III, Jump Boost II

**Upgraded Honey Bottle**: Removes **all** effects (also removes positive ones, like milk), Regeneration II, Speed II, Absorption II (6 hearts)

**Upgraded Cooked Rabbit**: Speed V, Jump Boost IV (both for 2 minutes)

**Upgraded Pumpkin Pie**: Absorption III, Strength II, Resistance

**Upgraded Cooked Mutton**: Luck, Strength

**Upgraded Sweet Berries**: Speed, Strength II

**Upgraded Glow Berries**: Removes **all** effects, Glowing, Regeneration

**Upgraded Golden Carrot**: Fire Resistance, Resistance

**Upgraded Cooked Cod**: Conduit Power, Water Breathing, Dolphins Grace (all three for longer than dried kelp)

**Upgraded Cooked Salmon**: Conduit Power, Water Breathing, Dolphins Grace (all three for longer than dried kelp)

and also:

**Rotten Flesh** --> **Leather**

**Pufferfish** --> **Raw Salmon**

**Poisonous Potato** --> **Potato**
